qids.prose: Consider the following relation: Consider the following SQL query. SELECT S.Student_Name, Sum(P. Marks) FROM Student S, Performance P WHERE S.Roll_No= P.Roll_No GROUP BY S.STUDENT_Name The numbers of rows that will be returned by the SQL query is_________________.
